summary:
INTRODUCTION AND PROPHETIC CONTEXT: Brandon shares a detailed account of a vivid dream he experienced, aiming to disseminate it online so that people can pray over its contents. Brandon is uncertain about the exact prophetic timeline of the events in his dream, wondering whether they take place before the tribulation as part of the initial birthing pains of the end times, or if they occur during the tribulation itself. The overarching purpose of his message is to warn others about an impending global catastrophe that he believes was shown to him.

ASTEROID APPROACH AND INTERCEPTION ATTEMPT: In the dream, Brandon witnesses a colossal asteroid hurtling toward Earth at an incredibly high speed. The approach of this massive object is a deeply sensory experience for Brandon; it appears as a giant fireball and a streak of light in the sky, while generating a deafening noise comparable to massive freight trains. The sheer velocity and size of the asteroid cause the entire earth to shake. Due to its extreme speed, traditional rockets are completely useless. Instead, Brandon observes the United States government attempting to neutralize the threat using a green laser beam weapon. This laser successfully strikes the asteroid, splitting it into two pieces. While one half shatters into tiny, harmless fragments, the remaining half stays intact and maintains its massive, destructive scale.

IMPACT AND RESULTING TSUNAMI DEVASTATION: The intact portion of the asteroid crashes into the Atlantic Ocean near San Juan, Puerto Rico, and the Bahamas. Brandon vividly details how this impact generates a catastrophic tsunami with waves towering at least one hundred feet high. Moving at an astonishing speed, the massive wall of water completely engulfs nearby island nations, specifically covering Haiti and the Bahamas. The geographical reach of the tsunami is immense, extending as far as the coast of Africa. Furthermore, Brandon describes the devastating effect on the American coastline, particularly impacting North Carolina, South Carolina, and Florida. The most severe destruction Brandon witnesses occurs in the Miami and Fort Lauderdale areas, where the water surges violently inland, completely flattening houses and buildings just like the historical tsunami that struck Japan.

EMOTIONAL IMPACT AND SPIRITUAL RESPONSE: The sheer scale of the destruction leaves millions of people dead, lost, or in severe distress. This catastrophic vision causes Brandon to wake up in a cold sweat, deeply shaken by what he has witnessed. Immediately following the dream, Brandon feels a strong divine prompting to pray for the potential victims. Brandon fervently prays that these individuals will hear the warning, heed the message, and evacuate the targeted areas before the disaster strikes so they can get out of harm's way. Brandon expresses a deep, heavy burden in his heart to share this vision, regardless of whether the event can be stopped or prevented. 

LACK OF WARNING AND FINAL THOUGHTS: A crucial detail Brandon points out is the complete absence of any prior warning regarding this catastrophic event. Brandon specifically notes that space agencies like NASA had no advanced knowledge of the asteroid's approach. There are no public announcements, television broadcasts, or emergency alerts to warn the global population; the disaster happens suddenly and unexpectedly, causing worldwide devastation. Concluding his message, Brandon reiterates his uncertainty about the exact biblical timing of these events but emphasizes his duty to share what he has been shown. Brandon thanks his audience for watching and mentions that he plans to release additional videos detailing other visions he has received.
rawData: [June 29, 2023]-[The Lord showed me an asteroid hitting the Atlantic ocean and a massive tsunami hitting]-[https://youtu.be/NZu1xk5IGHw]-[Hi, I just wanted to tell you another dream I had a while back that I want to get out there. I want to get this on the web to let people pray over this. I don't know if this is during the tribulation that this happens or if this happens before the tribulation, but you know, it's part of the birthing pains that happen. In this dream, there's a massive asteroid and it's coming into the Earth. I see it and everybody can see it, but you could hear it; it sounded like massive freight trains. Everything was shaking and moving so fast. I went outside in the dream and looked up, and it's just a massive streak of light, a fireball coming out of the sky. It was moving so quick and so fast that it sounded like the whole earth was shaking. It was incredible; this thing was humongous. In the dream, the United States tried to shoot it down with a laser beam. It was moving too quick to shoot it down with a rocket, so they used this laser beam that, in my dream, was green. They hit it with this laser weapon and it split the rock. This massive asteroid split in two and it busted up one half into little bitty fragments, but the other half was still massive. It hit by the islands, by San Juan, Puerto Rico, and the Bahamas—all that area out there. When it did, it crashed into the ocean and created this massive tsunami. I'm talking humongous, like 100 feet up or more. It was moving so quick and so fast; it covered the islands up. It covered Haiti; it covered those things up. It just went over the top of them. I could see it in the dream; these islands were just completely engulfed with water. It went clear into Africa. When it came into America, because it was so close, it hit Miami, North Carolina, and South Carolina—all that area. But the main area that I was shown in the dream was the Miami area and Fort Lauderdale. It went inland like the one that hit Japan; the tsunami wave washed in and just wiped out houses and buildings like they were nothing. It just blew them down. There were millions of people who were in trouble and lost. Many were dead, and the Lord had me praying. When I woke up the next day, He had me praying for these people that they would hear Him and that they would not be there at that time—that they would leave if this is something that was going to happen soon. I don't know, but I prayed for these people so they would get out of harm's way. It was just something that was very... when you wake up, you're in a cold sweat because it shook me. I was like, 'Lord, I have to tell people about this,' but I've just prayed over it. I could see that it was going to happen, and I don't know if we can stop it or prevent it or whatever. I just felt in my heart, this massive tsunami, this massive asteroid coming out of the sky. I've looked online at the NASA site to see, but they didn't know this was coming. They didn't announce it on TV; they didn't tell people that it was coming. It just happened and, like I said, it was humongous. It flew in and hit out there in the ocean, in the Atlantic. It caused devastation worldwide. I don't know if this is the Tribulation the Lord is showing me, or if it's something that happens in the birthing pains, but it's just one of the things I felt like I should share that the Lord has shown me. Thank you very much for watching. There are other things that the Lord showed me, and I'm going to tell those in other videos. Have a blessed day. Bye.]
